steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$page = get_page_by_path( 'import', OBJECT, 'page' );
$content = '<!-- wp:static-site-importer/importer {"title":"Import HTML to WordPress","intro":"Upload a website or paste HTML. Static Site Importer will generate your new WordPress website.","applyToCurrentSite":false,"generateInCurrentRuntime":true} /-->';
$post = array(
    'post_title' => 'Import Static Site',
    'post_name' => 'import',
    'post_type' => 'page',
    'post_status' => 'publish',
    'post_content' => $content,
    'comment_status' => 'closed',
    'ping_status' => 'closed',
);
if ( $page instanceof WP_Post ) {
    $post['ID'] = $page->ID;
    wp_update_post( $post );
} else {
    wp_insert_post( $post );
}
update_option( 'static_site_importer_protected_pages', array( 'import' ), false );
?>
